message:
fix(codegen): Remove incorrect 'try' on comparison dunder methods

Comparison dunder methods (__lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__) return PyValue
(not error unions), so they should not be wrapped with 'try'. This was
causing compilation errors like:

  error: expected error union type, found 'Objects.object.PyValue'

Fixed by removing 'try' prefix from all 8 locations:
- Left operand: __lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__
- Right operand (reflected): __gt__, __ge__, __lt__, __le__

Updated comments to match __eq__ pattern which correctly states
'no try needed'.

Fixes test_bool compilation and enables all comparison operations
on custom classes.
